page_metadata.biotools__summary: Global and local quality estimation of 3D protein models. It integrates scores from three pure-single model methods and three quasi-single model methods using a neural network to estimate local quality scores.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Global and local quality estimation of 3D protein models. It integrates scores from three pure-single model methods and three quasi-single model methods using a neural network to estimate local quality scores.
